case_title: SCOTT, MYRON K. VS KRAMER, KEVIN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2001 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV.7,2001 BY ROBERT KANE,JUDGE PRO TEM

THIS ACTION ORDERED STAYED ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT KEVIN KRAMER FILE A SMALL CLAIMS ACTION AGAINST HIS PREDECESSOR IN INTEREST JOHANESS KOCH AND ANY OTHER PARTIES WHOM HE BELIEVES IS LIABLE FOR ANY CLAIMS OF MYRON K. SCOTT WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM 11-19-01. M.SCOTT SHALL BE GIVEN NOTICE OF SAID FILING AND OF ALL PROCEEDINGS ON THAT MATTER SO HIS CLAIM CAN BE CONSOLIDATED WITH THAT ACTION. IF SAID ACTION IS NOT FILED WITHIN THAT TIME, M. SCOTT WILL NOTIFY THE COURT WHICH WILL DECIDE HIS CASE.
